[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101001011 5
1 111111011 8
2 001001010 3
3 110100100 4
4 011111111 8
5 111111011 8
6 101011101 6
7 011101111 7

45 000000000 a

67 001001011 4
70 100000000 1
